sizing_rule.note: Optimal f = 0.954 derived from empirical trade distribution bounded at worst-case loss (-2.96σ) and best-case gain (+6.94σ) with 300 data points. Requires actual trade stream data with identified extremes; not standard deviation multiples.

source_rule_text: Position size should be based on optimal f derived from the empirical distribution of trades bounded by actual worst-case loss and best-case gain rather than standard deviation multiples.
